ddf93ab6-82ec-4b5a-8921-23da6cbe754a.content:
we are looking for
Who are we and what do we do? 
Quicko is a Zerodha investee startup, that offers an online platform for tax compliances. 
Individuals and Businesses in India can save, pay, and file taxes with the help of our user
friendly products. 
We are a young team of designers, developers, content writers, growth marketers & 
accountants who are on a mission to simplify taxes for all. With our business scaling up, we 
continue to build a culture that emphasizes on growth and development of each individual 
through well-designed internship programs, jam sessions, mentorships, and much more. 
Currently, we are growing our team, right here from Ahmedabad. If you are someone, who is a 
big believer of technology in finance and is open to taking up new challenges, we would love 
to have a conversation with you. 
What are we looking for? 
We are looking for a full-stack developer with strong problem-solving skills. Someone who is 
adaptive, and open to learning and exploring new tools and technologies. As a developer, the 
major role would include helping us in designing, developing, and testing software 
applications. 
What will you be doing? 
 Writing and documenting easy-to-consume Rest APIs 
 Designing programming patterns, by writing clean, concise & reusable code 
 Understanding of different design patterns and data structures 
 Writing modular codes that are configurable, extensible, and testable 
 Driving product design discussions using tools such as Figma and Figjam 
 Track User behavior and Conversions using Funnel analysis using Fullstory or similar tools 
 Analyze and document business requirements and translate them into functional 
requirements using Notion or similar tools 
 Collaboration with cross-functional teams and conducting code reviews 
Requirements 
What will you need to succeed at Quicko? 
 Ability to understand and use the right data structures and algorithms 
 Understanding of object-oriented programming and design patterns 
 Strong knowledge of databases such as MySQL, PostgreSQL or MongoDB 
 Working knowledge of relational & non-relational databases 
 Expertise in server-side technologies 
 A good understanding of REST APIs and working knowledge of HTTP(S) 
 Experience with cloud infrastructure such as AWS 
 Ability to work with a team in a fast-paced, dynamic environment

through well-designed internship programs, jam sessions, mentorships, and much more. 
Currently, we are growing our team, right here from Ahmedabad. If you are someone, who is a 
big believer of technology in finance and is open to taking up new challenges, we would love 
to have a conversation with you. 
What are we looking for? 
We are looking for a full-stack developer with strong problem-solving skills. Someone who is 
adaptive, and open to learning and exploring new tools and technologies. As a developer, the 
major role would include helping us in designing, developing, and testing software 
applications. 
What will you be doing? 
 Writing and documenting easy-to-consume Rest APIs 
 Designing programming patterns, by writing clean, concise & reusable code 
 Understanding of different design patterns and data structures 
 Writing modular codes that are configurable, extensible, and testable 
 Driving product design discussions using tools such as Figma and Figjam 
 Track User behavior and Conversions using Funnel analysis using Fullstory or similar tools 
 Analyze and document business requirements and translate them into functional 
requirements using Notion or similar tools 
 Collaboration with cross-functional teams and conducting code reviews 
Requirements 
What will you need to succeed at Quicko? 
 Ability to understand and use the right data structures and algorithms 
 Understanding of object-oriented programming and design patterns 
 Strong knowledge of databases such as MySQL, PostgreSQL or MongoDB 
 Working knowledge of relational & non-relational databases 
 Expertise in server-side technologies 
 A good understanding of REST APIs and working knowledge of HTTP(S) 
 Experience with cloud infrastructure such as AWS 
 Ability to work with a team in a fast-paced, dynamic environment
